results.prompt: Build a one-page neon fitness landing page I can preview. It must include the exact heading Kinetic Pulse, a hero paragraph, and a primary CTA button labeled Start Training. Use a dark visual style and make it runnable now.

dom.title: kinetic pulse
dom.text:
K
kinetic pulse
Platform
Preview
Flow
Launch
View programs

NEON PERFORMANCE TRAINING

kinetic pulse

A dark, neon fitness landing page for athletes who want sharp programming, visible momentum, and a training flow that feels ready to start.

start training
Explore the training flow
6 wk
strength cycle preview
24/7
training plan access
4.9/5
athlete energy rating

WHY IT FEELS BETTER

Electric energy, clear programs, and a CTA that feels ready to move.

The page keeps the fitness promise visible: powerful headline, performance proof, and direct training actions without burying the user in generic marketing copy.

Neon dark shell
Training-first CTA
Mobile workout flow

FLOW

Pulse sessions

High-output training blocks with enough structure to feel serious without becoming intimidating.

FLOW

Recovery rhythm

A calmer supporting section balances the neon intensity with mobility, rest, and repeatable progress.

FLOW

Coach-ready preview

Responsive cards, strong CTA grouping, and a training story that still reads clearly on a phone.

READY TO MOVE

Turn intent into the next training block.
start training

results.prompt: Build the first runnable version now. Create a compact but polished shared shopping app for a household or roommates. Use Tailwind CSS v4 styling and framer-motion for subtle motion, seed mock data for members, items, aisle or category groupings, and activity messages. The preview must visibly include the heading Shared Shopping List plus separate sections labeled Household and Activity Chat.

dom.title: Shared Shopping List
dom.text:
FIRST RUNNABLE VERSION NOW. CREATE A COMPACT BUT POLISHED SHARED SHOPPING APP FOR A HOUSEHOLD OR ROOMMATES. USE TAILWIND CSS V4 STYLING AND FRAMER-MOTION FOR SUBTLE MOTION, SEED MOCK DATA FOR MEMBERS, ITEMS, AISLE OR CATEGORY GROUPINGS, AND ACTIVITY MESSAGES. THE PREVIEW MUST VISIBLY INCLUDE THE HEADING SHARED SHOPPING LIST PLUS SEPARATE SECTIONS LABELED HOUSEHOLD AND ACTIVITY CHAT.

Shared Shopping List

Built for a real store run: household context on one side, aisle-first list in the middle, and a route-ready store plan that feels like a product instead of a dashboard.

QUICK ADD

results.prompt: Build me a photography portfolio with a fullscreen lightbox and masonry gallery. Make it feel like a premium editorial portfolio, not a generic starter.

dom.title: Photography Portfolio
dom.text:
PHOTOGRAPHY PORTFOLIO

Images that feel composed, tactile, and ready to be remembered.

Editorial photography for people, spaces, and campaigns that need mood, clarity, and a strong sense of place.

Book a session
View selected work
SELECTED FRAME
Afterlight

Warm dusk over the city with a clean, modern colour story.

LATE EVENING FEATURE
Editorial direction
Portrait rhythm
Campaign polish
Modern booking flow
EDITORIAL
Afterlight

Warm dusk over the city with a clean, modern colour story.

LATE EVENING FEATURE
EDITORIAL

Texture, glass, and reflected neon for a sharper brand mood.

URBAN STUDY
PORTRAIT
Rooftop Study

Soft directional light and calm posture without visual noise.

CITY ROOFTOP
LIFESTYLE
Morning Run

Motion, distance, and enough atmosphere to keep the frame alive.

EARLY MOVEMENT
CAMPAIGN

Clean composition with a cool palette and restrained styling.

PRODUCT FEATURE
STILL LIFE

Minimal shapes, tactile surfaces, and deliberate spacing.
